name: Accelerating Masked Diffusion Large Language Models: A Survey of Efficient Inference Techniques
summary: arXiv:2607.12829v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Diffusion large language models (dLLMs) offer a theoretical advantage in parallel generation over standard autoregressive models. However, parallel...
description: arXiv:2607.12829v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Diffusion large language models (dLLMs) offer a theoretical advantage in parallel generation over standard autoregressive models. However, parallel generation alone does not guarantee practical speedups. Realizing this efficiency requires specialized inference mechanisms, such as diffusion-aware caching and reuse. Consequently, as inference effi...
author: Daehoon Gwak, Minhyung Lee, Junwoo Park, Jaegul Choo
